testcase.name: test_product_stats_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_mira_breed_products_iteration_228.py:28: in test_product_stats_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stats endpoint failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stats endpoint failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
